fields.title: Ralph: child session keeps running but UI disappears after /ralph start handoff
fields.description: Current repro in real interactive pi: /ralph start succeeds far enough to create an active loop with ownership.child set, and the user sees sandbox approvals from the child session, but the Ralph dashboard/chat UI appears briefly and then disappears. Evidence from cairn: .pi/loops/state/cairn-ew0.json shows lifecycle=active, iteration=1, and ownership.child populated, so core loop execution continues while session/UI handoff is lost. This strongly suggests Ralph cannot be treated as a fire-and-forget detached background loop with the current pi session model; the regression likely lives in command/session ownership and UI synchronization introduced during recent Ralph refactors / Effect v4 migration.
